ddls:
CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used in the iteration */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the panel configuration */,
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the suggestion configuration */,
  "distances" TEXT /* Distance metrics used in the iteration */,
  "iteration_time" REAL /* Time taken for the iteration */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Cumulative time taken including previous iterations */,
  "target_found" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the target was found in the iteration */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation of the algorithm */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration ended */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Algorithm-specific parameters used in the iteration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the iteration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES panels ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_suggestion_id FOREIGN KEY ("suggestion_id") REFERENCES suggestions ("suggestion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each panel configuration */,
  "panel_configuration" TEXT /* Array representing the panel configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the panel configuration */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the panel configuration was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the panel configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suggestions" (
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suggestion configuration */,
  "suggestion_configuration" TEXT /* Array representing the suggestion configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the suggestion configuration */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suggestion configuration was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suggestion configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suggestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suggestions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who added the algorithm */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the generation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation ended */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., efficiency, accuracy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
